The user is showing me deployment information for their frontend and backend services. They've deployed:
1. Frontend: visual-interaction.9622.online
2. Backend: visual-interaction-api.9622.online

They want me to update the URLs in the codebase to reflect these deployment endpoints. Let me first explore the codebase to find where these URLs are configured.
I'll find and update the API URLs in your codebase.
Let me check the .env file and look for API configuration in the frontend code.

parts.text: This is a Flutter frontend! Let me search for API configuration in Flutter files.

state.title: localhost|http.*5000|baseUrl|api.*url

parts.text: Found it! The API URLs are in `frontend/lib/services/api_service.dart`. Let me update that file to use the production URL.

state.output:
<path>/home/tejasree/visual-task/visual-interaction/frontend/lib/services/api_service.dart</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: import 'dart:convert';
2: import 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';
3: import 'package:http/http.dart' as http;
4: 
5: class ApiService {
6:   static String get baseUrl {
7:     if (kIsWeb) {
8:       return 'https://visual-interaction-backend.onrender.com';
9:     }
10:     return 'http://10.0.2.2:5000';
11:   }
12: 
13:   static String get apiBaseUrl => baseUrl;
14: 
15:   static String getMediaUrl(String path) {
16:     if (path.startsWith('/media/')) {
17:       return '$baseUrl$path';
18:     }
19:     return path;
20:   }
21: 
22:   Future<Map<String, dynamic>> getSimulationData(
23:       Map<String, dynamic> params) async {
24:     try {
25:       final response = await http.post(
26:         Uri.parse('$baseUrl/api/simulation'),
27:         headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
28:         body: jsonEncode(params),
29:       );
30:       return jsonDecode(response.body);
31:     } catch (e) {
32:       return {'error': e.toString()};
33:     }
34:   }
35: }

(End of file - total 35 lines)
</content>
state.title: frontend/lib/services/api_service.dart

parts.text:
Done! I've updated:
1. `frontend/lib/services/api_service.dart` - Changed the web baseUrl from `https://visual-interaction-backend.onrender.com` to `https://visual-interaction-api.9622.online`
2. `.env` - Updated `NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL` from `http://localhost:5000` to `https://visual-interaction-api.9622.online`

Let me also check if there are any other files that might have hardcoded URLs.

Updated API URLs:
- `frontend/lib/services/api_service.dart`: Changed web baseUrl to `https://visual-interaction-api.9622.online`
- `.env`: Updated `NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL` to `https://visual-interaction-api.9622.online`

The frontend will now point to your new backend deployment.
